title: Permission Escalation: Unauthorized Form Editing Access
description: Risk that a user without proper admin role (global_admin or organisation_admin) gains access to the form editor, or that a user edits forms/sections/questions outside their organisation's scope due to insufficient permission checks.

changeHistory.newValue: A user without admin privileges modifies form definitions or an organisation_admin accidentally modifies forms belonging to another organisation, leading to cross-organisation data contamination or unauthorized form deployment.

hazardousSituation: A user without admin privileges modifies form definitions or an organisation_admin accidentally modifies forms belonging to another organisation, leading to cross-organisation data contamination or unauthorized form deployment.
